view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook, but the evidence provided does not confirm its existence or functionality. While the linked use case describes the need for such an interface, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to support its validation. Therefore, the step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
